summary: Iteration 260 - AI Co-Pilot, Learning Toggle, and Pack Studio Testing Complete. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified including Economy page with 4 tabs (Subscriptions/Learning Packs/Brokerage/Pack Studio), Synthesis Forge, and Learning Toggle floating panel with AI Co-Pilot.

issues: Credits running low notification overlay can block Learning Toggle button click - requires force=True or JS click to bypass

critical_code_review_comments: copilot.py: CONTEXT_HINTS dict provides static hints for trade/hexagram/constellation/wallet/sentinel/forge/subscription/commission contexts
copilot.py: GET /hint/{context} returns hint with title, why, tip, pack_link
copilot.py: POST /micro-lesson checks learning_toggle state - returns null lesson when OFF, generates AI lesson when ON
copilot.py: POST /generate-pack creates full curriculum with financials dashboard (suggested_retail, creator_revenue_per_sale, projected_monthly_revenue, commission rates)
copilot.py: POST /publish-pack/{draft_id} moves draft to marketplace_packs collection
copilot.py: GET /drafts returns user drafts with financials
copilot.py: GET /marketplace returns active packs and user's published packs
copilot.py: GET /toggle-status returns learning_toggle, modality, intensity, advancement level (Observer/Practitioner/Professional/Sovereign based on modules_completed)
ModalityContext.js: setLearningToggle persists via PATCH /api/academy/intensity with learning_toggle field
LearningToggle.js: Floating button at bottom-right with expandable panel containing toggle switch, advancement level, context buttons, copilot input
EconomyPage.js: 4 tabs - Subscriptions, Learning Packs, Brokerage, Pack Studio (Synthesis Forge)
EconomyPage.js: Pack Studio has gen-field-input, gen-expertise-input, gen-type-mini/mastery/business selectors, gen-submit-btn
EconomyPage.js: Generated pack shows gen-result (curriculum), gen-financials (projections), gen-publish (deploy button)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed pack drafts during testing (TEST_Artisan Bread Baking, TEST_Publish Test Pack)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 260 verified AI Co-Pilot and Pack Studio features: (1) GET /api/copilot/toggle-status returns learning_toggle boolean, advancement level (1-4: Observer/Practitioner/Professional/Sovereign based on modules_completed), modality, intensity. (2) GET /api/copilot/hint/{context} returns static hints for trade/hexagram/wallet/forge/sentinel contexts. (3) POST /api/copilot/micro-lesson generates AI lesson when learning_toggle=ON, returns {lesson: null} when OFF. (4) POST /api/copilot/generate-pack creates pack draft with curriculum outline and financials dashboard (suggested_retail, creator_revenue_per_sale, projected_monthly_revenue, commission rates). (5) POST /api/copilot/publish-pack/{draft_id} publishes draft to marketplace. (6) GET /api/copilot/drafts returns user drafts with financials. (7) GET /api/copilot/marketplace returns active packs. (8) PATCH /api/academy/intensity with learning_toggle field persists toggle state. (9) Frontend: Economy page has 4 tabs (tab-subscriptions, tab-packs, tab-commissions, tab-generator). (10) Frontend: Pack Studio tab shows Synthesis Forge with gen-field-input, gen-expertise-input, gen-type-mini/mastery/business, gen-submit-btn. (11) Frontend: Learning Toggle floating button (learning-toggle-btn) opens panel (learning-toggle-panel) with toggle switch (learning-toggle-switch), advancement level, context buttons (copilot-ctx-trade/hexagram/wallet/forge/sentinel), copilot-input, copilot-ask-btn. (12) User has 4 modules completed = Level 2 Practitioner. (13) Learning toggle is currently ON. (14) Existing drafts: TEST_Publish Test Pack (published), TEST_Artisan Bread Baking (draft), Specialty Coffee Roasting Profiles (published, mastery).
